로마서 1:1.content: Paul, a servant of Jesus Christ, called to be an apostle, set apart for the Good News of God,

로마서 1:2.content: which he promised before through his prophets in the holy Scriptures,

로마서 1:3.content: concerning his Son, who was born of the offspring of David according to the flesh,

로마서 1:4.content: who was declared to be the Son of God with power, according to the Spirit of holiness, by the resurrection from the dead, Jesus Christ our Lord,

로마서 1:5.content: through whom we received grace and apostleship for obedience of faith among all the nations for his name’s sake;

로마서 1:6.content: among whom you are also called to belong to Jesus Christ;

로마서 1:7.content: to all who are in Rome, beloved of God, called to be saints: Grace to you and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.

로마서 1:8.content: First, I thank my God through Jesus Christ for all of you, that your faith is proclaimed throughout the whole world.

로마서 1:9.content: For God is my witness, whom I serve in my spirit in the Good News of his Son, how unceasingly I make mention of you always in my prayers,

로마서 1:10.content: requesting, if by any means now at last I may be prospered by the will of God to come to you.

로마서 1:11.content: For I long to see you, that I may impart to you some spiritual gift, to the end that you may be established;

로마서 1:12.content: that is, that I with you may be encouraged in you, each of us by the other’s faith, both yours and mine.

로마서 1:13.content: Now I don’t desire to have you unaware, brothers, that I often planned to come to you, and was hindered so far, that I might have some fruit among you also, even as among the rest of the Gentiles.

로마서 1:14.content: I am debtor both to Greeks and to foreigners, both to the wise and to the foolish.

로마서 1:15.content: So as much as is in me, I am eager to preach the Good News to you also who are in Rome.

로마서 1:16.content: For I am not ashamed of the Good News of Christ, because it is the power of God for salvation for everyone who believes, for the Jew first, and also for the Greek.

로마서 1:17.content: For in it is revealed God’s righteousness from faith to faith. As it is written, “But the righteous shall live by faith.”

로마서 1:18.content: For the wrath of God is revealed from heaven against all ungodliness and unrighteousness of men who suppress the truth in unrighteousness,

로마서 1:19.content: because that which is known of God is revealed in them, for God revealed it to them.

로마서 1:20.content: For the invisible things of him since the creation of the world are clearly seen, being perceived through the things that are made, even his everlasting power and divinity, that they may be without excuse.

로마서 1:21.content: Because knowing God, they didn’t glorify him as God, and didn’t give thanks, but became vain in their reasoning, and their senseless heart was darkened.

로마서 1:22.content: Professing themselves to be wise, they became fools,

로마서 1:23.content: and traded the glory of the incorruptible God for the likeness of an image of corruptible man, and of birds, four-footed animals, and creeping things.

로마서 1:24.content: Therefore God also gave them up in the lusts of their hearts to uncleanness, that their bodies should be dishonored among themselves;

로마서 1:25.content: who exchanged the truth of God for a lie, and worshiped and served the creature rather than the Creator, who is blessed forever. Amen.

로마서 1:26.content: For this reason, God gave them up to vile passions. For their women changed the natural function into that which is against nature.

로마서 1:27.content: Likewise also the men, leaving the natural function of the woman, burned in their lust toward one another, men doing what is inappropriate with men, and receiving in themselves the due penalty of their error.

로마서 1:28.content: Even as they refused to have God in their knowledge, God gave them up to a reprobate mind, to do those things which are not fitting;

로마서 1:29.content: being filled with all unrighteousness, sexual immorality, wickedness, covetousness, malice; full of envy, murder, strife, deceit, evil habits, secret slanderers,

로마서 1:30.content: backbiters, hateful to God, insolent, arrogant, boastful, inventors of evil things, disobedient to parents,

로마서 1:31.content: without understanding, covenant breakers, without natural affection, unforgiving, unmerciful;

로마서 1:32.content: who, knowing the ordinance of God, that those who practice such things are worthy of death, not only do the same, but also approve of those who practice them.
